summary: Rubikon Center operators conducted strikes in the Donbas, Krasny Liman direction on March 7, destroying 88 Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel and countering Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with over 1,500 such UAVs intercepted to date, including 343 Leleka-100, 132 Fury, and 98 other models. Lasar’s Group NSU repelled mechanized assaults by the enemy in the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks with support from Azov Corps and the 9th Army. ZALA Lancet operators, despite electronic warfare interference, successfully struck group targets using loitering munitions, maximizing strike efficiency. Iran’s new subsonic loitering air defense missile, Missile 358, equipped with thermal imaging homing heads, proved effective against Israeli Hermes-900 UAVs. Ukraine launched Mission Control, a unified digital system for drone operations, to improve battlefield coordination and effectiveness.
